name: 閃攻機人アスラ - ASURA THE STRIKER -
short_description: A high-speed 3D rail shooter inspired by legendary arcade classics. Control the humanoid combat weapon ASURA and battle overwhelming waves of invaders using Energy Shot, Shining Knuckle, and the time-bending Lightning Over Drive.
detailed_description:
🚀 About ASURA THE STRIKER

ASURA THE STRIKER is a high-speed 3D rail shooter inspired by the legendary arcade shooters of the 80s and 90s.

Take control of the humanoid combat weapon "ASURA" and intercept waves of invaders descending from space. Experience explosive action, relentless speed, and intense battles against overwhelming enemy forces.

  • Energy Shot – Your primary ranged attack

  • Shining Knuckle – Charge power and unleash a devastating close-range punch

  • Lightning Over Drive – Slow down time to evade impossible attacks

Master these three abilities and fight your way through massive enemy formations.

🎮 Signature Actions

Blast through swarms of invaders!

Fight through massive enemy formations as the battlefield unfolds at blazing speed.

Escape danger with Lightning Over Drive!

Activate the special ability "Lightning Over Drive" to slow down time and slip through dense enemy attacks.

Crush powerful foes with Shining Knuckle!

Charge your energy and unleash the devastating attack "Shining Knuckle" to smash powerful enemies.

Terrifying invader bosses await!

At the end of each stage, powerful invader bosses stand in your way.

🕹️ Basic Controls

  • Movement: Left Stick / D-Pad

  • Energy Shot: Press to fire

  • Shining Knuckle: Hold the punch button → Release to unleash a powerful punch

  • Lightning Over Drive: Press the slow button to activate time slowdown (consumes gauge)

When releasing the stick, you can choose whether ASURA returns to the center or remains in place via the options menu.

🧪 About the Developers

LeftOver is an indie development brand formed by two creators. Nearly every aspect of the game — planning, programming, design, and sound — is handled by the two of us.

Development may take time, but we are committed to delivering the best possible arcade-style experience. Thank you for your support.

⚠️ Performance Notice

When using monitors with refresh rates higher than 60Hz, the game speed may behave unexpectedly. If this occurs, please disable vSync in the in-game options.

OPTION → vSync → Off

🛠️ Reducing Rendering Load

The OPTION menu includes a "Render Resolution" setting. Lowering this value reduces rendering load in exchange for image quality. Please use this option if the game runs slowly.

supported_languages: English, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Spanish - Latin America, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian
